title: tetramolopium corallioides
intro: Tetramolopium corallioides, also known as Coral Island Tetramolopium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the Pacific island of Niue. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetramolopium corallioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
